title: GTM-WJ463T Pixel Access
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Keith Bruss, Ovidiu Dita, Predrag
description:
Hi, ! It looks like we accidentally granted access to the wrong pixel before; they need access to the GTM account with the GTM-WJ463T container. Here's the exact text from the email Emily sent:

Hey Savana,
 
We placed the tag correctly and published it to the homepage via GTM. Then, we debugged to confirm fires and did not see fires come through. From there, we checked the site to ensure the GTM container is physically on Minton's site. Here is the GTM container we were given access to - GTM-TVGBDJZ6. This container is not placed on Minton's site therefore, the pixel did not stick.
 
There seems to be another GTM container applied to their site - GTM-WJ463T. Would you be able to grant access to the GTM account with the container just mentioned?

Let me know if you have any questions or if we need to pull in the dev team! Thank you!

title: Request for new logo/brand design
description:
Hi Team,

Minton Law has reached out requesting help creating a new logo for their mediation services. Megan mentioned that she recalls that Clixsy may have assisted with their original logo. The new logo would incorporate the Minton wordmark and an outline of Arkansas, and would replace "Law Firm Personal Injury Attorneys" with "Mediation Services."

Key Questions / Clarifications Needed:

Is logo design offered as an in-scope service, or will this cost the client extra?
Does Clixsy have the original Minton logo files on record?
Should the client be quoted for a change order, or referred to a third-party designer?

Relevant Client Message:
"I think we went through Clixsy to do our logo. I was needing some help. We want to incorporate the Minton and the Arkansas outline in our new mediation services logo. I was thinking taking out Law Firm Personal Injury Attorneys and just having it say Mediation Services. Can y'all help with this?"
